title: Thug Entrancer
role_summary: Alias / stage name of Ryan McRyhew. Canonical entry is [[people/ryan-mcryhew]].
body: Redirect entry. **Thug Entrancer** is the current stage name of **Ryan McRyhew**. See [[people/ryan-mcryhew]] for full biography, discography, and relationship to Colin. Retained as its own file so references to "Thug Entrancer" resolve unambiguously in wikilinks.
